message:
feat(search): add TantivySearchService implementing LexicalSearchService trait

Add production Tantivy backend for the frankensearch-lexical search interface:
- TantivySearchService: full LexicalSearchService impl with text search,
  filtering (pane_id, session_id, source, event_type, direction, time_range),
  pagination, snippets, count, get_by_event_id, get_by_log_offset
- document_to_fields(): reverse conversion from Tantivy docs to IndexDocumentFields
- 16 new tests covering all search operations and round-trip fidelity

Bead: ft-dr6zv.1.3 (tantivy unification acceptance criterion)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
